prestazioni: 1UR-FSE 4.6L V8 (386hp stock) forced-induction conversion via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (850hp capable with supporting mods), utilizing a custom billet crankshaft pulley and HKS intercooler core with dual 45mm Tial BOV setup for optimized boost response on 91 octane fuel

Full 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Authorize R with 304-grade mandrel bends, 100-cell GReddy catalytic converters, and a custom X-pipe merging into dual 120mm titanium-tipped mufflers for aggressive V8 tone without drone

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Lexus LS460-specific valving) with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates, and Swift Springs helper springs for F Sport chassis geometry, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (LS460-specific fitment) with carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in BASF RM Diamond White with 3M Matte Black wrap accents on the roof and pillars

VMR V710 20x10.5 ET25 front and 20x12 ET40 rear wheels with 275/30R20 and 315/25R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors and AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with custom braided lines

Custom LED taillight conversion by Diode Dynamics with sequential turn signals, smoked reflectors, and integrated Vland side markers, complemented by a full carbon fiber engine cover and GReddy Type-S front grille with F Sport badge delete
